errors.forbidden: You don't have permission for this action
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests — please slow down and try again

password_reset.subject: {app_name} — password reset
password_reset.body: Someone (we hope it was you) asked to reset your {app_name} password. Click the link below to set a new one. The link is valid for 30 minutes and can only be used once.
password_reset.footer: If you didn't ask for this, you can safely ignore this email — no change has been made.

email_verify.subject: {app_name} — confirm your email
email_verify.body: Click the link below to confirm your email address. The link is valid for 24 hours.
email_verify.footer: If you didn't sign up for {app_name}, you can ignore this email.

email_change.subject: {app_name} — confirm your new email
email_change.body: You asked to change your {app_name} email to this address. Click the link below to confirm. The link is valid for 30 minutes and can only be used once.
email_change.footer: If you didn't make this change, you can safely ignore this email — your account is unchanged.
